### Discussion

- Jsonify is a data extraction tool built on top of the OpenAI API
- Currently processing 50,000 requests per day
- Pricing: $49/month for basic, $199/month for pro
- Built in Python with FastAPI backend
- Uses spaCy for local entity extraction as a fallback
- Considering adding support for Claude API
- Revenue: $20k MRR, growing 15% month over month
